title: Embroidery Shears 4.5" Kelly Angular Sewing Tailors Sharp Scissors Craft & Hobby
description:
Get those hard to reach/cut spots anywhere, anytime. Angled scissors make it easy to cut tough materials or at strange angles. Compact design makes transportation and storage a breeze: 4.5 inch scissors can fit in most bag or purse pockets. Rounded finger holes allow for maximum comfort and the angled blade reduces risk of harm. 100 % Stainless Steel. Great for personal care, tight bandages, medical care, arts and crafts, and more!
